projectDescription: Automatically generate voice narration for your Mintlify documentation using Fish Audio TTS.
keyFeatures: Generate TTS audio directly from MDX files with intelligent hash-based caching
Support for multiple voices with easy YAML configuration
Upload audio files to S3-compatible storage (Cloudflare R2, MinIO, etc.)
Automatic injection of audio player components into documentation
Cleanup orphaned audio files from S3
CI/CD pipeline ready with dry-run mode
publicApiSurface: injectAudioComponent(content: string, voices: Voice[], hash: string, options: ComponentOptions): Promise<string>
resolveConfig(options: GenerateOptions | CleanupOptions, directory: string): Promise<ResolvedConfig>
